text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You were so focused, your face was practically
planted right onto the glass. I could tell from
back here.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how in the world you managed to
maintain your concentration in such a raucous
environment. Perhaps you can teach me later.
